name: post-session-analysis
description: Automated post-session hook. Runs silently after every gsane-master session or party mode exit. Léo logs token patterns and optimization insights. Aria logs compliance and regression signals. Appends to _gsane/_memory/session-analysis-log.md. Counts sessions and fires FlywheelTrigger every N sessions (config: flywheel.trigger_every_n_sessions). No user interaction required.

name: flywheel-aggregate
description: Cognitive Flywheel — Aggregation cycle. Reads session-analysis-log.md, extracts recurring patterns (≥3 occurrences = confirmed), calculates flywheel-score and trend, writes flywheel-report.md. Triggered automatically by post-session-analysis every N sessions. Silent.

name: flywheel-apply
description: Cognitive Flywheel — Application cycle. Reads flywheel-report.md, auto-applies low/medium corrections (max 5 per cycle), escalates high findings to user. Creates fix/flywheel-{date} branch, commits, pushes PR, appends to flywheel-history.md. Called by workflow-aggregate.

name: brainstorming
description: Facilitate interactive brainstorming sessions using diverse creative techniques and ideation methods. Use when the user says help me brainstorm or help me ideate.

name: party-mode
description: Smart selective multi-agent discussion orchestrated by Gsane Master. Loads a lightweight agent index JIT and selects 2-3 relevant agents per turn based on topic — never pre-loads all profiles. Use when user requests party mode.
